acceptance_criteria: Ctrl+K opens a command palette overlay with searchable action list
Command palette shows actions: Create Task, Run Agent, View Workflow, Toggle Daemon, Refresh, Toggle Print Mode
Command palette supports fuzzy search by typing to filter actions
Enter executes selected action, Esc closes palette
H key moves focus to the left pane, L moves to the right pane
J key moves focus down in current pane, K moves focus up
gg moves selection to first item in current pane, G moves to last item
/ key activates search mode for current pane, Enter to execute search, Esc to cancel
? key shows help overlay with all keyboard shortcuts
Help overlay displays: navigation keys, command palette, search, refresh, print mode, quit
All vim-style keys work in their expected contexts (not interfering with prompt input)
Visual indicator shows which pane currently has focus
Existing functionality (q to quit, Ctrl+C, Enter to run, p for print mode, r for refresh, Ctrl+L clear) continues to work
description:
Add command palette and vim-style navigation to the TUI for power users.

**Implementation boundary:** This covers the TUI component in `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/tui/` only. No changes to daemon, agent runner, or other CLI commands.

**Technical approach:**
- Add `pane_focus` state to track which pane has keyboard focus (0=models, 1=output, 2=tasks)
- Add `command_palette_open` state with fuzzy search filtering
- Add `search_mode` and `search_query` state for / search
- Add `help_overlay` state for ? overlay
- Extend event handler to intercept vim keys only when not in prompt input mode
- Add command palette rendering overlay
- Add help overlay rendering
- Update footer to show focused pane indicator
title: Add command palette and vim-style navigation to TUI
